mapper.sql: d.id, d.name, d.address, d.type, d.layout, d.region, d.total_rooms, d.status, -- 入居部屋数聚合 COUNT(CASE WHEN r.status = 'occupied' AND r.is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) AS occupied_rooms, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_deleted = 0 THEN 1 END) AS room_count
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) FROM dorm_info d
SELECT id, name, address, type, layout, region, total_rooms, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM dorm_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_info (name, address, type, layout, region, total_rooms, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{type}, #{layout}, #{region}, #{totalRooms}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE dorm_info
name = #{name}, address = #{address}, type = #{type}, layout = #{layout}, region = #{region}, total_rooms = #{totalRooms}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE dorm_info SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
